description: String Join is a protoflux node that can take a Separator (String), and a some Inputs (List of String) and combine them, separating each item with Separator (String), or with nothing if Separator (String) is not provided.

fields.Separator: The item to separate the Inputs (List of String) when joined.
fields.* ([[Type:String|String]]): Returns all Inputs (List of String) joined together in order while separated by Separator (String).
